boundary: P14-V returns to Branch V and builds a current-current vector matching gate before proton limits.  It does not reuse the P7 scalar/source chiral-pair poles, and it does not compute physical proton lifetimes.

required_before_proton_limit: fix vector-current to all-left Fierz and crossing convention
contract with lattice or chiral hadronic matrix elements

description: Route-C P14-V Spin(10) vector-branch matching gate

gate_interpretation.off_face_diquark_like_pair_crossing_requ: Spin(10)/Pati-Salam off-face vector current pair containing two Q-to-u^c or Q-to-d^c transitions.  It is not a P7 scalar pole; it needs current-current Fierz matching.
gate_interpretation.off_face_mixed_pair_crossing_required: Spin(10)/Pati-Salam off-face mixed quark/lepton current pair. It remains a vector-current matching candidate, not yet a physical proton-width row.
gate_interpretation.ps_leptoquark_mixed_pair_crossing_requir: Pati-Salam leptoquark vector current pair with one Q/L transition and one conjugate quark/lepton transition.  It is a vector-branch candidate, but still needs an all-left Fierz map and flavor rotations before proton limits.
gate_interpretation.right_current_B_and_L_conserving_not_pro: Broken SU(2)_R charged current exchange is tracked for completeness but is not by itself a proton-decay seed.

next_stage.required_decision: Choose the convention-fixed current-current to all-left operator map for the vector branch, or keep P13-S scalar/source recoupling as the active proton-matching path.  Do not insert proton limits until one branch has flavor, RG, and hadronic inputs.

parallel_branch_status.scalar_source_branch: P13-S retained as a separate scalar/source Wilson-basis branch
parallel_branch_status.vector_branch: Branch V current-current matching gate is now explicit

proton_limit_blockers: current-current to all-left chiral Wilson basis recoupling
RG running from matching scale to hadronic scale
lattice or chiral hadronic matrix elements
experimental channel selection and lifetime limit

vector_matching_formula.current: J_X^mu = sum_a c_a psi_target(a)^dagger bar_sigma^mu psi_source(a)
